_comment: Hand-curated metadata overrides for RVC/TTS voice models. Keys match directory names under /opt/rvc-models/models/ on the VPS. These overrides are merged on top of auto-detected defaults by build-catalog.py when generating the public catalog.json.

rvc-voices/lunar-studio.name: Lunar Studio
rvc-voices/lunar-studio.description: High-fidelity female studio voice with warm, natural tone ideal for assistant use.

rvc-voices/ntts-ai.name: NTTS AI
rvc-voices/ntts-ai.description: Clean neural TTS voice with balanced, neutral delivery.

rvc-voices/google-assistant.name: Google Assistant
rvc-voices/google-assistant.description: Familiar modern assistant voice with clear, approachable delivery.

rvc-voices/google-gemini.name: Google Gemini
rvc-voices/google-gemini.description: Modern AI assistant voice with clean, contemporary tone.

rvc-voices/noaa-radio.name: NOAA Radio
rvc-voices/noaa-radio.description: Broadcast-style weather radio voice with measured, robotic cadence.

rvc-voices/dectalk.name: DECTalk
rvc-voices/dectalk.description: Classic retro synthesized voice reminiscent of early text-to-speech systems.

rvc-voices/liberty-prime.name: Liberty Prime
rvc-voices/liberty-prime.description: Deep, commanding robotic character voice inspired by Fallout's Liberty Prime.

rvc-voices/ami-mizuno.name: Ami Mizuno
rvc-voices/ami-mizuno.description: Clear, crisp female anime voice with gentle and intelligent tone.

rvc-voices/makoto-kino.name: Makoto Kino
rvc-voices/makoto-kino.description: Energetic, bright female anime voice with expressive delivery.

rvc-voices/ariana-grande-2010s.name: Ariana Grande (2010s)
rvc-voices/ariana-grande-2010s.description: Expressive female pop singing voice modeled after 2010s-era vocals.

rvc-voices/kanye-west.name: Kanye West
rvc-voices/kanye-west.description: Deep, expressive male voice with bold, assertive delivery.

rvc-voices/elvis-presley.name: Elvis Presley
rvc-voices/elvis-presley.description: Warm, deep classic crooner voice with rich baritone character.

rvc-voices/asuka-kazama.name: Asuka Kazama
rvc-voices/asuka-kazama.description: Strong, action-oriented female game character voice.

rvc-voices/fern-bfdie.name: Fern (BFDI/E)
rvc-voices/fern-bfdie.description: Clean, neutral animated character voice from Battle for Dream Island.

rvc-voices/rose-bfdie.name: Rose (BFDI/E)
rvc-voices/rose-bfdie.description: Gentle, soft female animated character voice from Battle for Dream Island.

rvc-voices/katseye-manon.name: KATSEYE Manon
rvc-voices/katseye-manon.description: Clear, modern female pop voice with natural, polished delivery.

rvc-voices/katseye-daniela.name: KATSEYE Daniela
rvc-voices/katseye-daniela.description: Clear female pop voice with bilingual versatility.

rvc-voices/phoenixstorm-default.name: PhoenixStorm Default
rvc-voices/phoenixstorm-default.description: Generic default voice useful for testing and baseline comparisons.

rvc-voices/female-whisper-tts.name: Female Whisper TTS
rvc-voices/female-whisper-tts.description: Soft, whispery female voice ideal for ASMR and gentle narration.

rvc-voices/blazblue-noel-english.name: BlazBlue Noel (English)
rvc-voices/blazblue-noel-english.description: Gentle female game character voice from BlazBlue's English dub.

kokoro/kokoro-v1.0.name: Kokoro v1.0
kokoro/kokoro-v1.0.description: High-quality natural TTS engine with multilingual support.

xtts-v2/model.name: XTTS v2
xtts-v2/model.description: Top-tier voice cloning model with multilingual and expressive capabilities.

f5-tts/model_1250000.name: F5-TTS
f5-tts/model_1250000.description: Fast voice cloning model with natural-sounding output.

styletts2/epochs_2nd_00020.name: StyleTTS 2
styletts2/epochs_2nd_00020.description: Expressive TTS model with fine-grained style and prosody control.

rvc-voices/spongebob.name: SpongeBob SquarePants
rvc-voices/spongebob.description: Iconic high-pitched cartoon voice from SpongeBob SquarePants.

rvc-voices/patrick-star.name: Patrick Star
rvc-voices/patrick-star.description: Deep, goofy cartoon voice from SpongeBob's best friend Patrick Star.

rvc-voices/squidward.name: Squidward Tentacles
rvc-voices/squidward.description: Nasal, grumpy cartoon voice of Squidward from SpongeBob.

rvc-voices/homer-simpson.name: Homer Simpson
rvc-voices/homer-simpson.description: Iconic deep comedic voice of Homer Simpson.

rvc-voices/peter-griffin.name: Peter Griffin
rvc-voices/peter-griffin.description: Deep comedic cartoon voice of Peter Griffin from Family Guy.

rvc-voices/stewie-griffin.name: Stewie Griffin
rvc-voices/stewie-griffin.description: British-accented baby villain voice from Family Guy.

rvc-voices/eric-cartman.name: Eric Cartman
rvc-voices/eric-cartman.description: Bratty, whiny cartoon voice of Eric Cartman from South Park.

rvc-voices/rick-sanchez.name: Rick Sanchez
rvc-voices/rick-sanchez.description: Raspy, nihilistic genius voice of Rick from Rick & Morty.

rvc-voices/optimus-prime.name: Optimus Prime
rvc-voices/optimus-prime.description: Deep, commanding leader voice of Optimus Prime from Transformers.

rvc-voices/darth-vader.name: Darth Vader
rvc-voices/darth-vader.description: Deep, menacing villain voice of Darth Vader from Star Wars.

rvc-voices/joker-heath-ledger.name: The Joker (Heath Ledger)
rvc-voices/joker-heath-ledger.description: Chaotic, menacing villain voice of The Joker from The Dark Knight.

rvc-voices/morgan-freeman.name: Morgan Freeman
rvc-voices/morgan-freeman.description: Deep, warm authoritative narrator voice of Morgan Freeman.

rvc-voices/david-attenborough.name: David Attenborough
rvc-voices/david-attenborough.description: Warm British documentary narrator voice of Sir David Attenborough.

rvc-voices/disco-elysium-narrator.name: Disco Elysium Narrator
rvc-voices/disco-elysium-narrator.description: Deep literary narrator voice from Disco Elysium (Lenval Brown).

rvc-voices/glados.name: GLaDOS
rvc-voices/glados.description: Sarcastic, robotic AI antagonist voice from Portal.

rvc-voices/sonic.name: Sonic the Hedgehog
rvc-voices/sonic.description: Fast, energetic voice of Sonic the Hedgehog.

rvc-voices/mario.name: Mario
rvc-voices/mario.description: Cheerful Italian-accented voice of Mario from Nintendo.

rvc-voices/british-male.name: British Male
rvc-voices/british-male.description: Formal British male voice with received pronunciation accent.

rvc-voices/british-female.name: British Female
rvc-voices/british-female.description: Clear British female voice with natural accent.

rvc-voices/nanou-asmr.name: Nanou ASMR
rvc-voices/nanou-asmr.description: Soft, calming ASMR whisper voice for relaxation.

rvc-voices/splicegirl.name: SpliceGirl
rvc-voices/splicegirl.description: Versatile female ASMR and singing voice.

rvc-voices/indian-female.name: Indian Female
rvc-voices/indian-female.description: Natural female voice with Indian English accent.

rvc-voices/taylor-swift.name: Taylor Swift
rvc-voices/taylor-swift.description: Clear, iconic female pop singing voice.

rvc-voices/adele.name: Adele
rvc-voices/adele.description: Powerful, emotional British soul singing voice.

rvc-voices/frank-sinatra.name: Frank Sinatra
rvc-voices/frank-sinatra.description: Smooth, warm classic jazz crooner voice.

rvc-voices/michael-jackson.name: Michael Jackson
rvc-voices/michael-jackson.description: Iconic smooth pop voice with distinctive falsetto.

rvc-voices/james-earl-jones.name: James Earl Jones
rvc-voices/james-earl-jones.description: Deep, authoritative bass voice — the voice of Darth Vader and Mufasa.

rvc-voices/samuel-l-jackson.name: Samuel L. Jackson
rvc-voices/samuel-l-jackson.description: Intense, commanding movie voice with bold delivery.

rvc-voices/snoop-dogg.name: Snoop Dogg
rvc-voices/snoop-dogg.description: Laid-back, smooth deep voice with distinctive cadence.

rvc-voices/gollum.name: Gollum
rvc-voices/gollum.description: Raspy, creepy fantasy character voice from Lord of the Rings.

rvc-voices/kermit.name: Kermit the Frog
rvc-voices/kermit.description: Gentle, iconic voice of Kermit the Frog from The Muppets.

rvc-voices/scooby-doo.name: Scooby-Doo
rvc-voices/scooby-doo.description: Goofy, lovable cartoon voice of Scooby-Doo.

rvc-voices/donald-duck.name: Donald Duck
rvc-voices/donald-duck.description: Iconic quacky voice of Donald Duck.

rvc-voices/yoda.name: Yoda
rvc-voices/yoda.description: Wise, distinctive voice of Yoda from Star Wars.

rvc-voices/elmo.name: Elmo
rvc-voices/elmo.description: High-pitched, cheerful child-like voice of Elmo from Sesame Street.

rvc-voices/bender.name: Bender
rvc-voices/bender.description: Sarcastic, robotic comedy voice of Bender from Futurama.

rvc-voices/mickey-mouse.name: Mickey Mouse
rvc-voices/mickey-mouse.description: Cheerful, high-pitched iconic voice of Mickey Mouse.

rvc-voices/shrek.name: Shrek
rvc-voices/shrek.description: Deep Scottish-accented voice of Shrek the ogre.

rvc-voices/pikachu.name: Pikachu
rvc-voices/pikachu.description: Cute, iconic voice of Pikachu from Pokemon.

rvc-voices/bugs-bunny.name: Bugs Bunny
rvc-voices/bugs-bunny.description: Witty Brooklyn-accented voice of Bugs Bunny.

rvc-voices/stitch.name: Stitch
rvc-voices/stitch.description: Chaotic, cute alien voice of Stitch from Lilo & Stitch.
